name: S-18 consumption trace records multiple consulted sources of mixed classes in a single trace invocation
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted-standards google-tsguide --consulted-pr-corpus stripe-node --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'google-tsguide' trace.json && grep -q 'stripe-node' trace.json && grep -q 'soc2-tsc' trace.json && echo multi 1>&2
